title: Pleione rigida
taxonomy: Pleione rigida is a species of orchid, and as such, its classification is as follows: it belongs to the family Orchidaceae, within the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Pleione is a part of the tribe Malaxideae. Further, it is placed in the subtribe Malaxidinae. The plant is native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia, and its specific classification within the orchid family is further detailed within botanical taxonomy. This classification system helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and diversity of orchid species.
uses: Pleione rigida is a type of terrestrial orchid native to China, and while information on its medicinal uses is limited, some studies suggest its potential in traditional medicine. More studies are necessary to fully understand the medicinal properties and uses of Pleione rigida.
